name: Mixed Greens and Fruit with Mustard Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped fresh chives or green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the olive oil, red wine vinegar, and Dijon mustard in a small bowl until well blended.
2. Stir in the chopped chives or green onions.
3. Season the dressing to taste with salt and pepper. (The dressing can be prepared up to 2 hours ahead of time and kept at room temperature.)
4. In a large bowl, combine the mixed baby lettuces, cucumber, jicama, red bell pepper, grapes, and mushrooms.
5. Add the dressing and toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
6. Season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
7. Serve 6 portions.
